name: WOLFBOT
appJsonDescription: Professional WhatsApp Bot with auto-session authentication

SESSION_ID.description: REQUIRED: Your WhatsApp session ID. Must begin with 'WOLF-BOT:'

PTERODACTYL_KEY.description: OPTIONAL: Your Pterodactyl Application API key (ptlc_...). Only needed if you use panel commands.

PTERODACTYL_URL.description: OPTIONAL: Your Pterodactyl panel URL (e.g. https://panel.example.com). Only needed if you use panel commands.

PAYSTACK_KEY.description: OPTIONAL: Your Paystack secret key (sk_live_... or sk_test_...). Only needed for M-Pesa STK push payments.

name: JUNE-X
appJsonDescription: June-X — a feature-rich WhatsApp bot built with Baileys.

SESSION_ID.description: Must begin with 'JUNE-MD:~'. Generate it from the bot's pairing flow.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number in international format without the + sign (e.g. 2547XXXXXXXX).
